channel.title: Paper Annotator Updates
channel.description: Signed macOS updates for Paper Annotator.

item.description:
# Paper Annotator 1.1.5
Vocabulary honesty release: every control now says exactly what it does.
- **Analysis tools get their own entry.** 专家视角 / 矛盾地图 / 研究简报 are passage-level analysis tasks (five-lens pressure test → contradiction mapping → synthesized brief), not sentence-problem marks — they now live behind a dedicated **分析 ▾** entry at the end of the selection toolbar instead of crowding the marking chips. Digit shortcuts 9/0 still work. - **完成标注 · 生成交接单** — the handoff button no longer implies the app will invoke an agent itself; it writes the handoff summary, nothing more. You hand the generated batch prompt files to Codex / Cloud Codex yourself. - **换说法·查证** — the rephrase chip now states its real contract: candidates must carry verifiable web sources (facts, terminology, collocations). For pure phrasing passes, use 速扫 / 语感 instead.
Requirements: Apple silicon Mac running macOS 10.13 or later.

# Paper Annotator 1.1.4
Workbench localization polish from field-test feedback.
- The three workbench mode tabs are now Chinese with hover hints explaining each interaction: **队列**（标注工作台：读正文、建标注、管队列）, **专注模式**（逐条审阅：←/→ 移动，A 接受，Z 撤销）, **文档视图**（只读纵览：按状态下划线）. - The reading-view toggle is clearer: **期刊排版**（期刊版式阅读与标注）and **Markdown 源码**（原始源码视图）, each with a hover hint; the **速扫** toggle now explains its full interaction (hover to reveal sentences, click to mark, click again to retract, digits 1–0 switch category). - No behavioral changes; all test ids unchanged.
Requirements: Apple silicon Mac running macOS 10.13 or later.

# Paper Annotator 1.1.3
Second round of field-test fixes for the marking workflow.
- **Fixed: the selection chip toolbar no longer flashes and vanishes before you can pick a preset.** WKWebView delivers the drag gesture's trailing click after the toolbar opens, which dismissed it instantly; dismissals inside the opening gesture's grace window are now ignored, so the toolbar stays until you choose a chip, press Esc, or click elsewhere. - **New: clicking a marked sentence opens an in-place action popover.** An untouched draft offers a one-click 撤销标注 right at the text; a mark that agents have already processed shows its status and points you to the queue panel instead. Drag-selection is no longer the only interactive surface. - **Undo now works for any untouched mark, from any session.** Deleting a mark no longer depends on a session token: as long as no batch, candidate, or audit has touched it, the annotation panel shows 撤销此标注 and a Sweep second-click on the sentence retracts it — including marks made before an app restart. Marks that agents have already processed remain protected.
Requirements: Apple silicon Mac running macOS 10.13 or later.
